rationale: Israeli military expansion and Beirut strikes continue near Romania's strategic neighborhood; domestic government formation remains unresolved but no new qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km; Beirut strikes continue
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military expansion in the eastern Mediterranean adds background pressure to Black Sea regional security and energy route stability relevant to Romania.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation (ongoing)
top_events.summary: Liberal PM nominee still awaiting confidence vote — domestic political uncertainty continues with no resolution this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Rhetoric-only signal from Trump; if Iran deal collapses, energy prices could rise, affecting Romanian households indirectly.
